typography.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-[#1E3A5F]
typography.label: text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#2563EB]

components.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 shadow-sm transition-all
components.button_gold_cta: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[#F4C430] px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold text-[#1E3A5F] transition-colors hover:bg-[#E5B520] shadow-md
components.button_blue_cta: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-[#2563EB] px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] shadow-md
components.button_black_pill: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-black px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors hover:bg-gray-800
components.button_outlined: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-[#1E3A5F] px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold text-[#1E3A5F] transition-colors hover:bg-[#1E3A5F] hover:text-white
components.card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

hero_background.description: Los Angeles sunny palm trees for Cerritos local vibe
hero_background.placement: Hero Section background with heavy #1E3A5F overlay (e.g., bg-[#1E3A5F]/80)

service_home.description: Family of four happily posing in front of their new brick house

service_auto.description: Aerial shot of black car on highway

icons_strategy.usage: Use Lucide icons for services (Home, Car, Shield, Briefcase), Awards (Trophy, Star), and Contact details (Phone, Mail, MapPin).

testing_attributes.requirements: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='get-quote-btn', data-testid='contact-submit')

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a complete Landing Page using HTML/Tailwind styling within standard React components (.js files).
Use the specific color hex codes provided (#DC143C, #F4C430, #1E3A5F, #2563EB). Do NOT default to generic Tailwind colors for the brand identity.
Implement a Sticky Header using backdrop-blur and border-b.
The Hero section must use 'hero_background' image with a heavy Navy Blue (#1E3A5F) overlay so the text (White and Gold) has high contrast. Provide 'Get Quote' and 'Our Services' CTAs.
Create a 'Best of Business' stats section utilizing the Brand Red and Gold accents.
Services Grid should be 4 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile, using the provided images for Home, Auto, Renter's, Commercial.
Testimonials section should use standard Shadcn/UI cards or pure Tailwind bento boxes.

The Contact section must include a static form (no backend required, prevent default on submit) and company info (Phone, Email, Cerritos CA address). 'Get Quote' buttons across the site must anchor link to this Contact section.
Ensure system-ui font stack is used explicitly.
Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx), use plain Javascript (.js) and Tailwind CSS.
